commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I will cause them to be removed into all kingdoms of the earth, because of Manasseh the son of Hezekiah king of Judah, for that which he did in Jerusalem. Hebrew, "agitation. "(Calmet) Septuagint, "necessities. "Protestants, "to be removed into all "(Haydock) This the event verified, Isaias xi. Though he obtained pardon, the people would not imitate his repentance. A dreadful warning for princes. (Calmet) "The people generally perish by the fault of their governors.
